decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble key pieces such as Defense Grid and Echo of Eons, while generating mana with cards like Mox Opal and Grim Monolith. The goal is to efficiently cast spells and generate mana using cards like Birgi, God of Storytelling and Simian Spirit Guide. By utilizing Wish','','');">Burning Wish and Rite of Flame, the deck can search for combo pieces and generate additional mana to continue its explosive plays. The inclusion of Moonsilver Key and Coveted Jewel provide additional utility and potential win conditions.

The deck focuses on assembling the Doomsday combo, using cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly and cast Doomsday. Once Doomsday is cast, the player can arrange their library to win the game with Thassa's Oracle or another win condition. The deck includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo and interact with the opponent. It also features cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder to dig through the deck and find the necessary combo pieces efficiently.

This deck focuses on using disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to control the opponent's resources while deploying efficient creatures like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf to apply pressure. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and additional disruption, while Daze and Wasteland help to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck also includes cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and fetch lands to ensure consistent draws and smooth mana development. Overall, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly closing out the game with aggressive threats.

The deck revolves around quickly assembling a combo that lets you mill your entire deck in one turn, then win the game by putting Thassa's Oracle on top of your library with very few cards left. This deck relies on explosive mana generation, disruption, and efficient milling to make sure you can execute your game plan as quickly as possible before your opponent can stop you. It aims to win in a single decisive turn, overwhelming your opponent with speed and accuracy.

The main concept of this deck is to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan using cheap and efficient spells and threats. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Wasteland, while also deploying aggressive creatures such as Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf to close out the game quickly. The tempo aspect of the deck comes from its ability to disrupt the opponent's strategy while advancing its own game plan, ultimately leading to a victory through a combination of aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on using lands to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It utilizes cards like Karakas, Rishadan Port, and Wasteland to keep the opponent's board in check, while also running powerful lands like Bojuka Bog and Dark Depths to generate advantage. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Maze of Ith, while also having the potential to combo off with cards like Thespian's Stage and Dark Depths for a quick win. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent through land interactions and disruption.

The main focus of this control - lands deck is to use cards like Thespian's Stage, Dark Depths, and Life from the Loam to create powerful land combinations and lock down the opponent's resources. The deck utilizes cards like Mox Diamond and Exploration to ramp up quickly and disrupt the opponent with cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter. The goal is to control the game through land manipulation and attrition, eventually overwhelming the opponent with powerful land-based threats and resource denial.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a powerful combo using a variety of cards that allow for fast mana generation, card draw, graveyard recursion, and protection. The goal is to mill through the deck rapidly to put Thassa's Oracle on top and win the game with its ability. The deck utilizes a mix of creatures, spells, and rituals to achieve a fast and explosive win condition while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with spells like Pact of Negation and Cabal Therapy.

This deck focuses on controlling the board through land destruction and disruption spells while utilizing lands with powerful abilities such as The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale and Dark Depths. The main strategy is to quickly assemble the combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 Marit Lage token. The deck also includes cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam to search for key lands and recur them from the graveyard. Overall, the deck seeks to dominate the game by efficiently managing resources and overwhelming the opponent with powerful land-based threats.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the Coveted Jewel combo using various tutor effects, such as Transmute Artifact and Stock Up, as well as acceleration from Grim Monolith and Ancient Tomb. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will to protect the combo pieces. Show and Tell can also be used to cheat out powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. Overall, the deck aims to win the game by generating a massive amount of mana with Coveted Jewel and overwhelming the opponent with powerful plays.

The main strategy of the deck is to establish a lock on the game by using artifacts to control the board and limit the opponent's options. By utilizing cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms, Trinisphere, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to prevent the opponent from executing their game plan while building towards a powerful end game win condition such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's plays and grinding out incremental advantages until it can overwhelm them with its powerful late-game threats.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands and control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building up a powerful board state. It heavily relies on cards like Exploration, Life from the Loam, and Crop Rotation to consistently search for and play key lands such as Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage, creating powerful token creatures. Additionally, cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter are used to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to control the game through land manipulation and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

The deck aims to cheat big, powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Archon of Cruelty onto the battlefield using Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. Utilizing cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Omniscience to generate advantage, the deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect its combo pieces. With a focus on casting massive threats quickly and unexpectedly, the deck looks to overwhelm opponents with its combination of powerful creatures and spell interactions.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board of small creatures (weenies) to overwhelm the opponent while disrupting their strategy with cards like Force of Will and Thoughtseize. It also utilizes card advantage and card selection with Stock Up, Brainstorm, and Ponder to maintain momentum and find key pieces. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Sheoldred's Edict provides additional threats and removal options to control the game. The planeswalkers Tamiyo and Teferi offer additional card advantage and disruption to maintain control and push towards victory.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cheap removal spells and hand disruption to control the board, while cards like Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm help dig for key pieces. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and flexibility, while Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf are powerful threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's spells. Overall, the deck aims to maintain tempo and outpace the opponent for victory.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo potential of Mystic Forge and Urza's Saga to generate value and set up powerful board states. The deck aims to assemble the pieces needed to generate infinite mana and card advantage, allowing for explosive plays and overwhelming the opponent. By using cards like Urza's Tower and Grim Monolith to ramp up mana production, along with support from Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, the deck can control the battlefield and set up game-winning combos efficiently.
